creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Koichiro Iwao from comment #0)

Sorry, somehow I missed your email (which is in my inbox) =/

Actually I had tested it with OpenSSL from base (not the openssl-devel from ports).

$ openssl version
OpenSSL 1.1.1-freebsd  11 Sep 2018

I'll commit this after a buildtest.

Thank you!
